parameters.content:
# Weekly Client Report Generator

# How It Works

This workflow automatically generates and emails weekly portfolio reports to clients. It fetches client data from Google Sheets, calculates investment, profit and growth, then uses AI to create a short, clear report. The report is formatted in HTML, sent via Gmail and the Google Sheet is updated to mark the email “Sent,” keeping track of all reports automatically.

# Setup Steps
## Prepare Google Sheet
Make sure your sheet has columns: Client, Email, Invested, Current Value and Status.

## Connect Accounts in n8n
Add credentials for Google Sheets, Gmail and Groq AI.

## Start Workflow
Use a trigger to begin.

## Process Data
Fetch client data, calculate portfolio metrics, generate AI report.

## Send Email & Update Sheet
Send the report via Gmail and update the Status column in Google Sheets.

## Client Data Fetch & Batch Processing

This section starts the workflow manually, fetches client data from Google Sheets and processes clients in batches. It ensures each client’s investment details (Invested, Current Value, Email) are handled individually, preparing accurate data for portfolio calculations and personalized report generation.

## Portfolio Calculation & Report Generation

These nodes calculate each client’s total investment, profit and growth. Then, AI generates a short, simple weekly report including Summary, Key Highlights, Risk Analysis and Future Outlook, also format the report.

## Final Delivery & Tracking

The Wait node ensures smooth processing, the Gmail node sends the weekly report to the client and the Google Sheets update node marks the “Status” as Sent, so you can track which clients have received their reports.

nodes.name: Get Client Data from Google Sheets

parameters.text:
=You are a financial analyst.

Generate a weekly client portfolio report using the data below:

Total Investment: {{$json.totalInvested}}
Current Value: {{$json.totalCurrent}}
Profit: {{$json.profit}}
Growth: {{$json.growth}}%

Your report must include:

1. Summary (overall performance in simple words)
2. Key Highlights (profit/loss insights)
3. Risk Analysis (low/medium/high risk)
4. Future Outlook (next week expectation)

Keep the report:
- Simple
- Professional
- Short (5–6 lines)

Do not use complex financial jargon.

parameters.message:
=Hello {{ $json.Client }},

Here is your weekly portfolio report:

{{ $json.formattedReport }}

Regards,
Your Company
parameters.subject: Weekly Portfolio Report

main.node: Get Client Data from Google Sheets
